about.title: About Yehoshama
about.subtitle: The commercial arm of the Yehoshama Foundation — building software that serves business with the same integrity that serves community.
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.p1: Yehoshama was born from a simple conviction: technology should empower, never exploit.
about.story.p2: The Yehoshama Foundation began as an open-source initiative — building resilient, unexploitative software protocols and tools. As the Foundation's work gained traction, a clear need emerged: businesses wanted access to the same quality, the same principles, applied to their own challenges.
about.story.p3: Yehoshama.com is the answer. We bring the Foundation's engineering standards, ethical commitment, and deep technical expertise to the commercial world. Every project we take on funds the Foundation's open-source mission — so when you work with us, you're also investing in technology that belongs to everyone.
about.story.p4: We don't cut corners. We don't sell your data. We build software that lasts, for people who value substance over hype.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.integrity.title: Integrity
about.values.integrity.desc: We say what we mean, deliver what we promise, and own our mistakes. Transparency isn't a marketing term — it's how we operate.
about.values.quality.title: Quality
about.values.quality.desc: Every line of code is reviewed, every system is tested, every deployment is monitored. We don't ship until it's right.
about.values.no_exploitation.title: No Exploitation
about.values.no_exploitation.desc: We will never sell your data, mine your usage patterns, or lock you into a system designed to extract value from you. Your software belongs to you.
about.values.transparency.title: Transparency
about.values.transparency.desc: Open communication throughout every project. You'll always know where things stand, what's working, and what needs attention.
about.team.title: The Team
about.team.intro: Small team, big standards. Every member is deeply committed to craft and quality.
about.team.member1.name: Agent [REDACTED]
about.team.member1.bio: Founder & Lead Engineer. Location unknown. Last seen optimizing a critical database cluster.
about.team.member2.name: Operative 04

about.team.member3.name: [NAME EXPUNGED]
about.team.member3.bio: Frontend Extraction Specialist. Can infiltrate any DOM tree and leave without a trace.
about.foundation.title: Backed by the Yehoshama Foundation
about.foundation.desc: We are the commercial arm of the Yehoshama Foundation. Proceeds from our work directly fund open-source development — protocols and tools designed to give people true digital independence.

services.custom_software.title: Custom Software
services.custom_software.desc: Bespoke applications tailored to your business needs. Backend, frontend, and full-stack solutions built from the ground up. We work with you to understand the problem before writing a single line of code.
services.api_development.title: API Development
services.api_development.desc: Robust, scalable REST and GraphQL API design and implementation. Built for performance, security, and reliability at any scale. Comprehensive documentation included.
services.system_architecture.title: System Architecture
services.system_architecture.desc: Infrastructure design, cloud architecture, and performance optimisation. We lay foundations that hold — whether you're building for thousands or millions of users.
services.security_audits.title: Security Audits
services.security_audits.desc: Comprehensive security reviews and penetration testing. We identify vulnerabilities before anyone else does and help you build a security-first culture.
services.data_engineering.title: Data Engineering
services.data_engineering.desc: Data pipelines, analytics infrastructure, and reporting systems. Turn raw data into actionable insights with reliable, well-documented systems.
services.maintenance_support.title: Maintenance & Support
services.maintenance_support.desc: Long-term maintenance, monitoring, and support for your existing systems. We keep things running so you can focus on your business.
services.process.title: Our Process
services.process.step1.title: 1. Discovery
services.process.step1.desc: We start by understanding your business, your users, and the problem you need solved.
services.process.step2.title: 2. Architecture
services.process.step2.desc: We design the system — data models, APIs, infrastructure — before writing any code.
services.process.step3.title: 3. Build
services.process.step3.desc: Iterative development with regular check-ins. You see progress, not just promises.
services.process.step4.title: 4. Test & Launch
services.process.step4.desc: Thorough testing, staging deployments, and a smooth handoff to production.
services.process.step5.title: 5. Support
services.process.step5.desc: We don't disappear after launch. Ongoing monitoring, maintenance, and iteration as your needs evolve.
products.page.subtitle: Tools and solutions we're building to solve real problems. Each product is self-contained, well-documented, and built to the same standard as our services.

products.all_products.title: All Products

products.product_alpha.desc: A powerful tool designed to streamline your workflow and boost productivity. Workflow automation, real-time collaboration, and enterprise-grade security.
products.product_beta.title: Project Beta (TBD)
products.product_beta.desc: Data-driven insights for businesses that want to understand their metrics. Real-time dashboards, ML-powered predictions, and automated reporting.
products.product_gamma.title: Project Gamma (TBD)
products.product_gamma.desc: Enterprise-grade security solutions built with transparency and integrity. Zero-trust architecture, end-to-end encryption, and compliance-ready.
